data.description: SAUDI AIR DEFENSES INTERCEPTED 45 DRONES IN THE EASTERN REGION OVER THE PAST 24 HOURS

data.title: QURE SHAREHOLDER NOTICE: Hagens Berman Updates uniQure (QURE) Investigation Following Public FDA Rebukes and Allegations of "Distorted" Data
data.description: A national shareholder rights law firm, Hagens Berman, is reminding investors of the upcoming April 13 deadline to appoint a lead plaintiff in a lawsuit against uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE). The firm is investigating the company following a string of unusual criticisms by the Food and Drug Administration. This information was released from San Francisco on March 20, 2026.

data.title: Artemis Adolescent Healing Center Expands its Footprint as a Residential Treatment Center for Troubled Teens
data.description: Artemis, a residential treatment provider for adolescents dealing with mental health and behavioral issues, is enhancing its capacity to deliver safe and clinically supervised services with its sustained expansion. The company, based in Tucson, Arizona, announced on March 20, 2026, its commitment to meeting the rising demand for youth mental health services. The investment in this sector has been increasing, indicating a growing focus on supporting adolescents in need. Artemis aims to support more individuals by reinforcing its resources and expertise in addressing mental health challenges among young people.

data.title: Efficient Markets and Ranchman Properties Team | with Keller Williams Realty Launch National Surface Land Partnership
data.description: In Houston, a strategic partnership has been formed between Efficient Markets and Ranchman Properties, led by Keller Williams Land Directors Ben Clark and Jason Trosper. This collaboration will merge Efficient Markets' national real asset auction platform with Ranchman's expertise in farm, ranch, and rural land brokerage under the Keller Williams Land brand. This partnership aims to leverage Efficient Markets' technology-driven auction platform with Ranchman Properties' specialized services. By aligning these two entities, they seek to enhance their offerings in the real estate sector.

data.title: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. – Announcement of Availability of 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. (OET) disclosed that its Fiscal Year 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F has been submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Interested parties can access the report on the SEC’s website or in the Investor Relations segment of the company’s website. To receive hard copies of the audited financial statements at no cost, individuals can reach out to the company via email or mail at ir@okeanisecotankers.com or Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp., address: Ethnarchou Makariou av. & 2 D. Falireos st., 18547 Neo Faliro, Greece.

data.title: Man admits using AI to earn $8M in fake music royalties, diverting funds from artists.
data.description: According to prosecutors, artificial intelligence-generated songs were used in a scheme that fraudulently redirected royalties from human artists, resulting in a total of $8 million being siphoned away.

data.title: Mesa Royalty Trust Announces Trust Income for March 2026
data.description: Houston-based Mesa Royalty Trust, listed as MTR on the NYSE, disclosed its income distribution update for March 2026. Unitholders recorded as of March 31, 2026, are set to obtain distributions totaling $0.005730260 per unit by April 30, 2026. The Trust garnered $33,481 in total, sourced entirely from its San Juan Basin properties in New Mexico, overseen by Hilcorp San Juan LP, a subsidiary of Hilcorp Energy Company. Notably, no income was procured for the month from any other sources.
Giga Metals finishes non-brokered private placement of flow-through shares, raising total of $5 million.

data.title: Zevra Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grant to New Chief Financial Officer Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Zevra Therapeutics, Inc. (ZVRA) based in Boston, disclosed granting an equity inducement award to Justin Renz, the newly appointed Chief Financial Officer. This award was issued in accordance with the 2023 Employment Inducement Award Plan, as amended, by the company focused on rare disease therapies. The grant, effective from March 18, 2026, was sanctioned by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors, following Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4). It was intended as a significant enticement for Mr. Renz to join Zevra, a commercial-stage entity catering to individuals affected by rare diseases.

data.title: Phoenix Energy Announces Distribution for Preferred Shares
data.description: Phoenix Energy has declared a distribution of $0.625 per preferred share, scheduled to be paid on April 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of April 1, 2026.

data.title: Ultragenyx Reports Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Novato, California - On March 20, 2026, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: RARE), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for rare diseases, announced the issuance of 10,839 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to two new non-executive officers. The compensation committee of the board of directors approved these awards under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on March 16, 2026. This inducement was crucial for the recruitment of new employees and complies with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Nevada is first to ban Kalshi prediction market for sports, politics, entertainment - ban in place for at least 14 days.
data.description: Nevada authorities have issued a ban on Kalshi's prediction markets for sports, politics, and entertainment for a minimum of 14 days. This comes as a response to concerns regarding the activities' potential impact. The prohibition will affect individuals involved in these markets and will be enforced within the state boundaries.

data.title: AIxCrypto Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Details
data.description: On March 20, 2026, a U.S.-Nasdaq listed company called AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (referred to as "AIxC") based in Los Angeles disclosed their plans to create a system that merges AI and blockchain technologies while connecting Web2 and Web3. This announcement came as the company prepared to reveal its financial results.

data.title: Imaginostics Receives Siemens Healthineers Letter of Support as Companies Advance Quantitative MRI Dialogue
data.description: Imaginostics, a company based in Orlando, Florida, has recently shared news about receiving a Letter of Support from Siemens Healthineers. This development is related to their discussions on collaborating in the field of quantitative MRI and imaging biomarkers. The partnership aims to explore technical and commercial opportunities for Imaginostics' prospective products, ImagiView™ and ImagiSight™. This collaboration could lead to advancements in utilizing innovative imaging technologies to enhance research and diagnostics related to conditions such as Alzheimer's disease and other illnesses.
KUWAITI ARMY: OUR AIR DEFENSES ARE CURRENTLY INTERCEPTING HOSTILE MISSILE AND DRONE ATTACKS.
US bank deposits rose to $18.876 tln from $18.816 tln in the prior week.

data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. Announces Availability of 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Scorpio Tankers Inc. revealed on March 20, 2026, that its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, has been officially submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Individuals interested in reviewing the report can find it accessible on the company's website, www.scorpiotankers.com. The report is located in the Investor Center section under Reports & Presentations. Scorpio Tankers, traded on the NYSE under the symbol STNG, is based in Monaco and informs stakeholders about its financial performance through this regulatory filing.

data.title: TekSynap Awarded Position on GSA’s Alliant 3 GWAC
data.description: TekSynap, based in Reston, Virginia, has recently secured a spot on the General Services Administration’s Alliant 3 Governmentwide Acquisition Contract. This contract is regarded as Best-in-Class and provides a pre-competed, multiple-award vehicle for federal agencies to efficiently procure complex enterprise IT services and solutions. The phase 1 awards for Alliant 3 were disclosed on February 20, 2026, with the contract becoming operational for ordering on March 10, 2026. The inclusion of TekSynap in this contract signifies a significant achievement in the company’s growth and capabilities.

data.title: XTL Biopharmaceuticals Announces ADS Ratio Change
data.description: XTL Biopharmaceuticals Ltd. revealed plans to alter the ratio of its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) to ordinary shares from 1 ADS to 100 ordinary shares to 1 ADS to 400 ordinary shares. This change, termed the ADS Ratio Change, is set to come into effect on March 25, 2026. The company, trading on the Nasdaq as XTLB and on the TASE as XTLB.TA, confirmed the adjustment to optimize its stock structure.

data.title: "Google Threat Intel identifies 'Ghostblade' malware as part of 'DarkSword' suite targeting crypto theft."
data.description: Ghostblade is just one of six malware tools found within the "DarkSword" suite, which is a collection of malicious software aimed at stealing cryptocurrency private keys and user data.
